# Report Format Guidelines

When asked to return a training or code change report without a detailed format requirement, use this markdown structure and return it as a file in the `report/` folder. Check commits history to make more value report.

## Training Summary Exam:
- Reviewed updated backend code and confirmed no TypeScript errors in modified files
- Practiced NestJS authentication:
  - login/logout flow
  - load user profile
  - Passport + `passport-jwt`
- Studied NestJS testing fundamentals:
  - `https://docs.nestjs.com/fundamentals/testing`
- Practiced Jest testing for React components:
  - `describe`
  - `test`
  - mock values
  - `beforeEach`
- Implemented custom Guards for authentication and role-based authorization (`user` / `admin`)
- Practiced writing custom Pipes
- Added frontend validation with Formik and Yup for creating posts and categories

## Notes
- Always create or update a markdown file in `report/` when the user asks for a report.
- Use this style and formatting unless the user requests a custom structure.
